evidence_summary.asset_bindings_intentionally_empty: Item candidates are carried in runtime collection_catalog and package asset_manifest, not runtime asset_bindings.

strategies.evidence: runtime.yaml preserves ideal branch policies for repeating /b/, naming valid B words, returning with a photo_id, and connecting the accepted object name to the sound.
runtime.yaml preserves unexpected branch policies for a cup/non-B answer and redirects to /b/ examples without weakening the source promise.
step_instructions include support for help/confusion through example B words, safe nearby-object hints, voice-only fallback, and one concrete naming prompt.
branch_policy includes no_response entries for hook, transition, every round, synthesis/celebrate, and closing; goals specify waiting, modeling, and soft closing behavior.
step goals require the one-object search and child-provided sound evidence before synthesis; closing allows a future round without starting fresh gameplay.
